methods.method_name: Accept a specified quote.
Activate a billing alert to allow it to trigger again.
Activate a testmode personalization design by updating its status to active.
Add a new item to an existing subscription without changing or replacing any existing items.
Advance a test clock to a specified future time by changing its status to "Ready".
Apply customer balance to reconcile a PaymentIntent.
Approve a pending Issuing Authorization object within the real-time authorization flow.
Approve a review to close and remove it from the list.
Archive a billing alert to remove it from the list view and APIs, which is non-reversible.
Archive an invoice rendering template to prevent new references and updates, while still applying it to existing Stripe objects.
Attach a feature to a product by creating a product feature representing the attachment.
Attach a payment to an invoice, updating the payment list and amount paid.
Attach a PaymentMethod to a Customer for future payments and set it as the default for invoices/subscriptions.
Bulk add multiple line items to an invoice that is still in draft status.
Bulk remove multiple line items from an invoice that is still in draft status.
Bulk update multiple line items on an invoice that is still in draft status.
Calculate tax based on input data and generate a Tax Calculation object.
Cancel a customer's subscription, either immediately or at the end of the period, preventing future charges.
Cancel a PaymentIntent, stopping additional charges and refunding remaining capturable amount if applicable.
Cancel a payout if its status is pending; funds are refunded to your balance. Automatic Stripe payouts cannot be canceled.
Cancel a quote.
Cancel a refund with a status of 'requires_action' for payment methods that require customer action.
Cancel a SetupIntent when it's in 'requires_payment_method', 'requires_confirmation', or 'requires_action' status.
Cancel a subscription immediately, preventing future charges and updates. Pending items are still charged unless manually deleted.
Cancel a subscription schedule and its associated subscription immediately if active, based on the provided schedule status.
Cancel a top-up transaction that is currently pending.
Cancel a VerificationSession when it is in 'requires_input' status to disable future submission attempts permanently.
Cancel an InboundTransfer.
Cancel an order within 24 hours of creation. Refunds subtotal amount for user-triggered cancellations.
Cancel an OutboundPayment.
Cancel an OutboundTransfer if funds have not been paid out yet.
Cancel the current reader action for a specific reader.
Capture a payment for an existing charge with the option set to false, before it expires.
Capture a test-mode authorization with options to specify capture amount and close authorization.
Capture funds of an uncaptured PaymentIntent with the specified amount, fees, and additional details.
Close a dispute for a specific charge.
Close a dispute, acknowledging it as lost and changing its status from 'needs_response' to 'lost'.
Close a FinancialAccount if it has a zero balance, no pending InboundTransfers, and canceled Issuing cards.
Confirm a PaymentIntent to initiate a payment with the customer's chosen payment method, handling authentication and payment status transitions.
Confirm a SetupIntent to indicate customer's intent to set up a payment method, transitioning to different statuses based on the outcome.
Create a billing alert with specified alert type, title, and usage threshold.
Create a billing meter event adjustment with specified event details.
Create a billing meter event with specified event details and payload.
Create a billing meter with specified customer mapping, aggregation, display name, event details, and value settings.
Create a Checkout Session with various customization options for a seamless payment experience.
Create a Climate order for a specific product, initiating immediate processing and deduction from your Stripe balance.
Create a connection token for connecting to a reader using the Stripe Terminal SDK.
Create a coupon with a specified discount amount or percentage, currency, and redemption details.
Create a credit grant with specified details like amount, applicability, and expiry date.
Create a credit note to adjust invoice amounts, issue refunds, credit customer balances, and record outside credits.
Create a Credit Reversal for a Received Credit.
Create a customer balance refund for a specific charge, refunding funds to the original payment method.
Create a customer balance refund for a specified charge or PaymentIntent object, refunding funds to the original payment method.
Create a dispute with optional evidence for an Issuing Dispute object in Stripe.
Create a draft invoice for a customer with various details like currency, due date, and description.
Create a login link for a connected account to access the Express Dashboard.
Create a new Account Session with a single-use token for client-side API access.
Create a new Apple Pay domain.
Create a new card for a customer or recipient, with the option to set it as the default card if no default exists.
Create a new card for a specific customer, setting it as the default if no default card exists.
Create a new card for a specified customer, with the option to set it as the default card if needed.
Create a new card with specified details like cardholder, currency, expiration date, and type.
Create a new cardholder with details like name, billing, and email to issue cards.
Create a new Configuration object with specified settings for terminal configurations.
Create a new customer balance transaction to update their credit balance.
Create a new customer object with specified details.
Create a new Customer Session with a single-use client secret for client-side API access.
Create a new feature with specified details.
Create a new file link with specified details.
Create a new file with specified purpose and optional expand parameters or file link data.
Create a new FinancialAccount with specific features, metadata, nickname, and supported currencies.

Create a new Onboarding Link with a redirect URL for onboarding onto Tap to Pay on iPhone.

Create a new OutboundPayment with specified details like amount, currency, and financial account.
Create a new payment method domain with specified details.

Create a new person with detailed information like name, address, email, and more in an account.
Create a new personalization design object with specified details.
Create a new price for an existing product, with options for recurring or one-time payments.
Create a new product object with details like name, description, images, and pricing.
Create a new reader object for a terminal with specified details like label, location, and metadata.
Create a new shipping rate with specified details.
Create a new subscription for a customer.

Create a new value list item and add it to the specified parent value list.
Create a new value list to reference in rules.

Create a PaymentIntent object to initiate a payment flow, attach a payment method, and confirm the payment.

Create a portal configuration defining PortalSession behavior and features.

Create a refund for a card-present charge using a Terminal-supported device.
Create a reversal transaction to partially or fully reverse a previously made transaction.
Create a session for the customer portal with specified configuration and customer details.
Create a SetupIntent to collect permissions for charging a payment method later.
Create a short-lived API key for a specified resource.
Create a single-use Stripe URL to redirect users for Connect Onboarding flow.
Create a single-use token representing bank account details for CVC update.
